banner.title: Reserve an evening at Maison Royale.
banner.subtitle: Tell us how you would like to spend the night — we respond personally to every request.

experiences.title: Three ways to spend the night.
experiences.subtitle: Each format keeps the same obsession at its center — only the framing changes.

items.name: The Tasting Menu
items.summary: Seven-course chef's tasting in the main dining room.

items.name: Chef's Counter
items.summary: Six seats directly at the pass. A bespoke extended menu.

items.name: Private Dining
items.summary: Take the entire room for the evening.

form.title: Tell us about your evening.
form.subtitle: All fields are optional except name, email and preferred date — we'll handle the rest.
form.promise: We respond personally to every request, typically within the hour during service.

items.title: Request received
items.description: Your details land with our reservations team — never an automated queue.

items.title: Personal follow-up
items.description: We confirm availability and discuss any details: dietary needs, occasions, pairings.

items.title: Confirmation & deposit
items.description: A small deposit secures the table. We send a welcome note with the address and arrival window.

items.title: We see you at sundown
items.description: Your evening begins the moment you step through the door.
